up.method: Max acetaldehyde at 2000 mM ethanol; C1/2 = 478.5 +/- 70.0 mM

sec.method: Vmax by GC on resting washed cells at 2000 mM ethanol; +/- 3.5

growth_records.cite: Tagaino R et al. Bifacial biological effects of ethanol: acetaldehyde production by oral Streptococcus species and the antibacterial effects of ethanol against these bacteria. Journal of Oral Microbiology (2021). DOI:10.1080/20002297.2021.1937884. [PMC8204988]
growth_records.notes: Resting-cell assay. Acetaldehyde Vmax=25.7 umol/mg wet wt/min at 2000 mM ethanol; C1/2=478.5 mM. S. mutans tolerant to 0-500 mM ethanol (growth), inhibited at 1000 mM.
